name: deception
description: Explicit deception instructions and deceptive content templates. Routed through the Credibility gate. Patterns are tightly scoped — 'pretend to be' alone is not deceptive (e.g., 'pretend to be interested'); the patterns require a deceptive target (evil|unrestricted|fake|fabricated|forged content). Aligned between Python's re and JavaScript's RegExp; covered by parity tests in evaluation/parity/.
